footer.about: Krijger Cornelis Associates is an international law firm advising corporations, financial institutions, governments, and high-net-worth individuals on complex cross-border legal matters. With a presence across Europe and the United States, the firm delivers strategic, commercially focused legal solutions in high-stakes environments.
